description: Lock the directly sourced chronology and fiscal mechanism for the medieval representative-assembly node.

checks.reason: Guild organization does not define the estates or territorial constituencies represented in the scoped assemblies.
Fiscal consent is a directly documented mechanism in the development of representative assemblies.
Taxation repeatedly drove consultation and consent without being the only path to representative institutions.
UNESCO identifies the Decreta of León of 1188 as the oldest known documentary manifestation of the European parliamentary system.
The narrowed node is anchored to the Achaemenid satrapal system established during imperial expansion beginning in the sixth century BCE.
